summary: Iteration 199: Tested Vendor Matching Gaps feature - all 30 backend tests passed. Verified GET /api/aliases/vendors/unmatched-gaps (normalized/merged variants, fuzzy candidates), GET /api/aliases/vendors/search-bc (manual BC vendor search), POST /api/aliases/vendors/dismiss-unmatched (dismiss functionality), POST /api/aliases/vendors/accept-suggestion (alias creation with variants), GET /api/readiness/exception-queue, and POST /api/readiness/sync-status.
critical_code_review_comments: aliases.py lines 300-456: GET /api/aliases/vendors/unmatched-gaps correctly implements name normalization with _normalize_for_group() function that removes trailing punctuation, normalizes LLC/Inc variants, and merges duplicates
aliases.py lines 419-438: Improved fuzzy matching uses Jaccard word overlap + first-word bonus + abbreviation handling for better candidate scoring

aliases.py lines 163-232: GET /api/aliases/vendors/search-bc correctly searches bc_reference_cache and vendor_invoice_profiles with case-insensitive regex, returns vendor_no, vendor_name, score, source
aliases.py lines 235-279: POST /api/aliases/vendors/dismiss-unmatched correctly marks docs as vendor_dismissed with status=Completed, auto_cleared=True, force_cleanup_rule=vendor_dismissed
aliases.py lines 459-553: POST /api/aliases/vendors/accept-suggestion correctly creates aliases for main name + all variants, re-validates affected docs with vendor_match check passed
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed aliases during testing, cleaned up at end
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 199 verified Vendor Matching Gaps feature. Key findings: (1) GET /api/aliases/vendors/unmatched-gaps returns {unmatched_vendors: [{vendor_name, variants, gap_count, sample_files, candidates}], total} - variants are merged using normalization (removes trailing punctuation, LLC/Inc variants), candidates have improved fuzzy matching with Jaccard + first-word bonus. (2) GET /api/aliases/vendors/search-bc?q=<query> requires min_length=2, returns {results: [{vendor_no, vendor_name, score, source}], query} - searches bc_reference_cache and vendor_invoice_profiles. (3) POST /api/aliases/vendors/dismiss-unmatched requires {vendor_name} in body, returns {vendor_name, docs_dismissed, reason} - marks docs as completed/auto_cleared. (4) POST /api/aliases/vendors/accept-suggestion requires {alias_string, vendor_no}, optional {vendor_name, variants}, returns {aliases_created, all_variants, docs_updated} - creates aliases for all variants and re-validates affected docs. (5) Exception queue and sync-status endpoints still working. Preview environment has minimal vendor data so unmatched_vendors may return 0 vendors.
